revision.comment: Match the behaviour of [[TM:lang]]
1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
Match the behaviour of [[TM:lang]]
1 revision imported: overwriting
Match the behaviour of [[TM:lang]]
1 revision imported: overwriting

Adding support for the case where the input is not a Unicode code point. This happens if someone passes a value greater than 10FFFF. These used to be codepoints in very old UCS versions. See [[UTF-8#Older standards]] and [[Private Use Areas#History]]
1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
